title: Sysmon Mimikatz Network Activity
description: Detects network connections from mimikatz or known credential theft tools accessing domain controller services (LDAP, Kerberos, SMB).
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Process Name' like '*\mimikatz.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\sekurlsa.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\procdump.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\lsass_dump.exe') and Initiated = 'true') or ( (('Process Name' like '*\mimikatz.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\sekurlsa.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\procdump.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\lsass_dump.exe') and Initiated = 'true') and (('Destination Port' = 88 or 'Destination Port' = 389 or 'Destination Port' = 445 or 'Destination Port' = 636 or 'Destination Port' = 3268)) ))
